Ntc Of Mtn & Mtn To Compel Answers To Interrogatories & Request For Production Of Documents & For Sanctions, Pos
Off Calendar Mar-11-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant's Motion To Compel Answers To Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff in the amount of $145.30, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT. MATTER NOT REPORTED
